children.text: out of its earnings and profits accumulated after , orFebruary 28, 1913

out of its earnings and profits of the taxable year (computed as of the close of the taxable year without diminution by reason of any distributions made during the taxable year), without regard to the amount of the earnings and profits at the time the distribution was made.

children.heading: Certain insurance company dividends
children.label: 1 Certain insurance company dividends
children.text: The definition in subsection (a) shall not apply to the term “dividend” as used in subchapter L in any case where the reference is to dividends of insurance companies paid to policyholders as such.

children.label: i
children.text: under the law applicable to the taxable year in which the distribution is made, is a personal holding company (as defined in section 542), or

children.label: ii
children.text: for the taxable year in respect of which the distribution is made under section 563(b) (relating to dividends paid after the close of the taxable year), or section 547 (relating to deficiency dividends), or the corresponding provisions of prior law, is a personal holding company under the law applicable to such taxable year,

children.label: i
children.text: only to the extent of the amounts distributed to distributees other than corporate shareholders, and

children.label: ii
children.text: only to the extent that the corporation designates such amounts as a dividend distribution and duly notifies such distributees of such designation, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, but

children.label: iii
children.text: not in excess of the sum of such distributees’ allocable share of the undistributed personal holding company income for such year, computed without regard to this subparagraph or section 562(b).

children.heading: Deficiency dividend distributions by a regulated investment company or real estate investment trust
children.label: 3 Deficiency dividend distributions by a regulated investment company or real estate investment trust
children.text: The term “dividend” also means any distribution of property (whether or not a dividend as defined in subsection (a)) which constitutes a “deficiency dividend” as defined in section 860(f).

children.heading: Certain distributions by regulated investment companies in excess of earnings and profits
children.label: 4 Certain distributions by regulated investment companies in excess of earnings and profits
children.text: In the case of a regulated investment company that has a taxable year other than a calendar year, if the distributions by the company with respect to any class of stock of such company for the taxable year exceed the company’s current and accumulated earnings and profits which may be used for the payment of dividends on such class of stock, the company’s current earnings and profits shall, for purposes of subsection (a), be allocated first to distributions with respect to such class of stock made during the portion of the taxable year which precedes January 1.
